# Sphinx documentation build stack for GLASS.
#
# GLASS is header-only CUDA/C++ (no Python package), so the API reference is
# generated by Doxygen (a system package — install separately, e.g.
# `apt-get install doxygen`) and bridged into Sphinx with Breathe.
Sphinx==8.1.3
pydata-sphinx-theme==0.16.0
myst-parser==4.0.0
sphinx-design==0.6.1
breathe==4.35.0
